recommendations.title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 1
recommendations.overview: In 1970s India, Sardar Khan vows to take revenge on the man who killed his father decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Ugly
recommendations.overview: When a 10-year old girl goes missing, her stepfather races against time to investigate the kidnapping. Can he find her before it's too late?

recommendations.title: Raman Raghav 2.0
recommendations.overview: A corrupt cop and a serial killer obsessed with a psychopath from the '60s get caught up in a ruthless cat-and-mouse game.

recommendations.title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 2
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father and brother Danish, Faizal Khan vows to take revenge by destroying Ramadhir Singh's gang.

recommendations.title: Lust Stories
recommendations.overview: An anthology of four stories that sheds light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman.
recommendations.director: Karan Johar, Zoya Akhtar, Anurag Kashyap, Dibakar Banerjee

recommendations.title: The Book Thief
recommendations.overview: While subjected to the horrors of WWII Germany, young Liesel finds solace by stealing books and sharing them with others. Under the stairs in her home, a Jewish refugee is being sheltered by her adoptive parents.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Qwerty
recommendations.overview: A grieving young inventor finds solace in repairing an antique typewriter.

recommendations.title: Jab We Met
recommendations.overview: A depressed wealthy businessman and a spunky carefree young woman embark on an unexpected journey that changes their lives.

recommendations.title: My Fault: London
recommendations.overview: 18-year-old Noah moves from America to London, with her mother who's recently fallen in love with William, a wealthy British businessman. Noah meets William’s son, bad-boy Nick, and soon discovers there is an attraction between them neither can avoid
